response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Reference JSON provided scene context but no lyrics; audio consists of spoken dialogue in English and Italian. 2. JSON Usage: Manual transcription utilized for all dialogue. Italian segments were manually translated. 3. Timing & Pacing: Rapid-fire dialogue with overlapping speech required tight timing and aggressive truncation to maintain synchronization. Bleeped offensive language is marked as [bleep].
